scripts.ci:fix: pnpm knip:fix && pnpm lint:fix && pnpm format && pnpm check-types && pnpm test:fix
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -prune -o -type d \( -name '.next' -o -name '.turbo' -o -name 'out' -o -name 'build' -o -name 'dist' -o -name 'coverage' -o -name 'storybook-static' \) -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find apps packages -name 'node_modules' -prune -o -type f \( -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -o -name 'next-env.d.ts' \) -delete && rm -f apps/user/public/blog-search-index.json apps/user/public/blog-search-index.version.json && find apps packages -type f -path '*/__screenshots__/*' \( -name '*.png' -o -name '*.jpg' -o -name '*.jpeg' -o -name '*.webp' \) -delete
